name: Spring Plaid Scatter Accent Rug - Pink/Green/Ivory - Threshold™
description:
Add a sophisticated charm to your home with this Spring Plaid Scatter Accent Rug from Threshold™. Made from 100% polyester material, the rectangular accent rug features plaid design in pink, green and ivory hue with side tassels for a timeless look, and the latex backing helps keep it in place. Suitable for indoor use, you can place this flat-pile rug by the entryway, kitchen or living room.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
